tooltip: Select Ghirahim as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Ghirahim focuses on improving Moblin and Bulblin units.
Allows you to summon Ghirahim, a powerful Mage hero.
Summon Bulblin Thug, cheap infantry that can stun enemies, and  battle boars, mighty ram creatures.
Access to Ukblinro Totems and Fortresses.
Summon Bokoblins, cheap infantry, and Demonblight Moblins, a mighty monster unit.
